query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- Lesson 360091 - Biblical Foundation of Spiritual Gifts
(360091, 'Spiritual gifts are given by whom according to 1 Corinthians 12?', 'multiple_choice', '["The pastor","The Holy Spirit","Church leaders","We choose them"]', 'The Holy Spirit', 1),
(360091, 'The Greek word for spiritual gifts is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Pneuma","Charismata","Dorea","Logos"]', 'Charismata', 2),
(360091, 'According to 1 Corinthians 12:7, gifts are given for what purpose?', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal benefit","The common good","Status","Entertainment"]', 'The common good', 3),
(360091, 'The primary passages on spiritual gifts are found where?', 'multiple_choice', '["Genesis and Exodus","Romans 12, 1 Corinthians 12, Ephesians 4","Psalms and Proverbs","Matthew and Mark"]', 'Romans 12, 1 Corinthians 12, Ephesians 4', 4),
(360091, 'Every believer has at least how many spiritual gifts?', 'multiple_choice', '["None","One or more","All of them","It varies"]', 'One or more', 5),
(360091, 'Spiritual gifts differ from natural talents how?', 'multiple_choice', '["They are the same","Gifts are Spirit-empowered for ministry","Talents are better","No difference"]', 'Gifts are Spirit-empowered for ministry', 6),
(360091, 'The purpose of spiritual gifts according to Ephesians 4 is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal glory","Building up the body of Christ","Competition","Entertainment"]', 'Building up the body of Christ', 7),
(360091, 'Spiritual gifts should be exercised with what according to 1 Corinthians 13?', 'multiple_choice', '["Pride","Love","Competition","Indifference"]', 'Love', 8),
(360091, 'The diversity of gifts in the church reflects what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Disunity","The wisdom of God in creating interdependence","Hierarchy","Competition"]', 'The wisdom of God in creating interdependence', 9),
(360091, 'Neglecting spiritual gifts is warned against in which book?', 'multiple_choice', '["Romans","1 Timothy","Galatians","James"]', '1 Timothy', 10),
(360091, 'Explain the relationship between spiritual gifts and the unity of the body of Christ.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Diverse gifts create interdependence and unity as each member contributes uniquely to the whole body functioning together.', 11),

-- Lesson 360092 - Categories and Types of Spiritual Gifts
(360092, 'Speaking gifts include which of the following?', 'multiple_choice', '["Helps","Prophecy, teaching, exhortation","Administration","Giving"]', 'Prophecy, teaching, exhortation', 1),
(360092, 'Serving gifts include which of the following?', 'multiple_choice', '["Prophecy","Helps, mercy, giving","Teaching","Tongues"]', 'Helps, mercy, giving', 2),
(360092, 'The gift of prophecy in the New Testament primarily involves what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Predicting the future","Speaking God truth for edification","Writing Scripture","Performing miracles"]', 'Speaking God truth for edification', 3),
(360092, 'The gift of teaching involves what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Entertainment","Explaining and applying Scripture","Preaching only","Writing books"]', 'Explaining and applying Scripture', 4),
(360092, 'The gift of helps is characterized by what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Public ministry","Serving others practical needs","Leadership","Preaching"]', 'Serving others practical needs', 5),
(360092, 'The gift of leadership involves what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Control","Guiding and organizing others toward goals","Dictatorship","Popularity"]', 'Guiding and organizing others toward goals', 6),
(360092, 'The gift of mercy is expressed through what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Judgment","Compassionate care for those suffering","Criticism","Indifference"]', 'Compassionate care for those suffering', 7),
(360092, 'The gift of giving is characterized by what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Reluctance","Generous and cheerful sharing of resources","Obligation","Showing off"]', 'Generous and cheerful sharing of resources', 8),
(360092, 'Sign gifts include which of the following?', 'multiple_choice', '["Teaching","Miracles, healing, tongues","Administration","Mercy"]', 'Miracles, healing, tongues', 9),
(360092, 'The gift of discernment helps the church do what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Judge people","Distinguish truth from error","Criticize","Condemn"]', 'Distinguish truth from error', 10),
(360092, 'Describe the difference between speaking gifts and serving gifts.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Speaking gifts involve verbal ministry of God Word; serving gifts involve practical ministry meeting tangible needs.', 11),

-- Lesson 360093 - Discovering Your Spiritual Gifts
(360093, 'The first step in discovering spiritual gifts is usually what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Taking a test","Prayer and study of Scripture","Asking the pastor","Trying everything"]', 'Prayer and study of Scripture', 1),
(360093, 'Spiritual gift assessments are helpful but should be viewed as what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Absolute truth","A starting point for exploration","Unnecessary","The final answer"]', 'A starting point for exploration', 2),
(360093, 'Confirmation of gifts often comes through what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Self-declaration","Feedback from others and fruitfulness","Feelings only","Tests only"]', 'Feedback from others and fruitfulness', 3),
(360093, 'Experimenting with different ministries helps in discovering gifts how?', 'multiple_choice', '["It wastes time","It reveals where you are effective and fulfilled","It is unnecessary","It confuses you"]', 'It reveals where you are effective and fulfilled', 4),
(360093, 'Your passions and burdens often relate to your gifts how?', 'multiple_choice', '["They are unrelated","God often aligns gifts with passions","Passions are selfish","Burdens are negative"]', 'God often aligns gifts with passions', 5),
(360093, 'The role of the local church in gift discovery is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Minimal","Essential for confirmation and development","Optional","Unnecessary"]', 'Essential for confirmation and development', 6),
(360093, 'Spiritual gifts can develop and grow through what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","Use, training, and experience","Age only","Education only"]', 'Use, training, and experience', 7),
(360093, 'Comparing your gifts to others is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Helpful","Unhelpful and can lead to pride or discouragement","Necessary","Required"]', 'Unhelpful and can lead to pride or discouragement', 8),
(360093, 'A primary indicator that you have a particular gift is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Desire alone","Effectiveness and fruit in that area","Others jealousy","Your preference"]', 'Effectiveness and fruit in that area', 9),
(360093, 'Gift discovery is best described as what kind of process?', 'multiple_choice', '["One-time event","Ongoing journey of discovery and development","Quick and easy","Unnecessary"]', 'Ongoing journey of discovery and development', 10),
(360093, 'Outline a practical process for discovering your spiritual gifts.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Pray, study Scripture on gifts, take assessments, try various ministries, seek feedback, observe fruitfulness, confirm with community.', 11),

-- Lesson 360094 - Developing and Using Your Gifts
(360094, 'The parable of the talents teaches what about gifts?', 'multiple_choice', '["Hide them","Use and multiply them for the Master","Ignore them","Compare them"]', 'Use and multiply them for the Master', 1),
(360094, 'Spiritual gifts should be developed through what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Neglect","Training, practice, and mentoring","Waiting","Isolation"]', 'Training, practice, and mentoring', 2),
(360094, 'Using gifts outside of love results in what according to 1 Corinthians 13?', 'multiple_choice', '["Great ministry","Nothing of eternal value","Success","Recognition"]', 'Nothing of eternal value', 3),
(360094, 'Accountability in gift use is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Limits freedom","Provides guidance and prevents misuse","Is unnecessary","Creates hierarchy"]', 'Provides guidance and prevents misuse', 4),
(360094, 'Gifts should be used in submission to what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal preference","Church leadership and Scripture","No one","Culture"]', 'Church leadership and Scripture', 5),
(360094, 'The goal of using spiritual gifts is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal recognition","Glorifying God and building up others","Self-fulfillment","Competition"]', 'Glorifying God and building up others', 6),
(360094, 'Burnout in ministry can be prevented by what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Working harder","Serving in your gift area with proper boundaries","Ignoring limits","Doing everything"]', 'Serving in your gift area with proper boundaries', 7),
(360094, 'Team ministry is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Is optional","Combines diverse gifts for greater effectiveness","Limits individuals","Creates competition"]', 'Combines diverse gifts for greater effectiveness', 8),
(360094, 'Faithfulness in using gifts is more important than what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","The size or visibility of the ministry","Effectiveness","Fruitfulness"]', 'The size or visibility of the ministry', 9),
(360094, 'Regular evaluation of gift use helps with what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Criticism","Growth and effectiveness","Discouragement","Nothing"]', 'Growth and effectiveness', 10),
(360094, 'Describe how to develop a spiritual gift once it has been identified.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Seek training, find a mentor, practice regularly, serve in that area, receive feedback, study Scripture related to the gift.', 11),

-- Lesson 360095 - Gifts and the Local Church
(360095, 'The body metaphor in 1 Corinthians 12 teaches what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Independence","Interdependence and mutual need","Hierarchy","Competition"]', 'Interdependence and mutual need', 1),
(360095, 'Every member ministry means what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only pastors minister","All believers have a ministry role","Ministry is optional","Some are spectators"]', 'All believers have a ministry role', 2),
(360095, 'Church leaders role regarding gifts is to do what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Do all ministry","Equip members to use their gifts","Control gifts","Limit gifts"]', 'Equip members to use their gifts', 3),
(360095, 'A healthy church has what regarding spiritual gifts?', 'multiple_choice', '["A few gifted people","Diverse gifts working together","Competition","Hierarchy"]', 'Diverse gifts working together', 4),
(360095, 'Gift-based ministry placement helps the church how?', 'multiple_choice', '["Creates problems","Increases effectiveness and satisfaction","Is unnecessary","Limits options"]', 'Increases effectiveness and satisfaction', 5),
(360095, 'The church should help members discover gifts through what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring them","Teaching, assessment, and ministry opportunities","Pressure","Assignments"]', 'Teaching, assessment, and ministry opportunities', 6),
(360095, 'Conflict over gifts in the church should be handled how?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignored","With love, humility, and biblical principles","By eliminating gifts","Through competition"]', 'With love, humility, and biblical principles', 7),
(360095, 'The church benefits when members use their gifts because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Creates work","Fulfills God design for the body","Is traditional","Looks good"]', 'Fulfills God design for the body', 8),
(360095, 'Unused gifts in the church result in what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","An incomplete and weakened body","Efficiency","Simplicity"]', 'An incomplete and weakened body', 9),
(360095, 'The ultimate purpose of gifts in the church is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Entertainment","Glorifying God and making disciples","Programs","Growth numbers"]', 'Glorifying God and making disciples', 10),
(360095, 'Explain how a church can create a culture that encourages gift discovery and use.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Teach on gifts, provide assessments, create ministry opportunities, celebrate service, mentor new servants, model gift use.', 11);

-- Lesson 360095 - Gifts and the Local Church
(360095, 'The body metaphor in 1 Corinthians 12 teaches what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Independence","Interdependence and mutual need","Hierarchy","Competition"]', 'Interdependence and mutual need', 1),

(360095, 'The church should help members discover gifts through what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring them","Teaching, assessment, and ministry opportunities","Pressure","Assignments"]', 'Teaching, assessment, and ministry opportunities', 6),
